summary: Backend-only testing for tag-triggered campaign enrollment with immediate task creation. All 9 tests passed. The fix correctly implements: (1) PATCH /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/tags now triggers _check_tag_campaign_enrollment, (2) immediate step 1 creates task+pending_send+notification when delay_hours=0, (3) enrollment advances to step 2 after step 1 processing, (4) no duplicate enrollments on re-applying same tag, (5) campaign duplication still works.
critical_code_review_comments: contacts.py line 17-177: _check_tag_campaign_enrollment correctly creates enrollment, task, pending_send, notification for immediate step 1
contacts.py line 821-825: update_contact_tags (PATCH endpoint) now calls _check_tag_campaign_enrollment after updating tags
contacts.py line 36-42: Duplicate enrollment prevention works via checking existing enrollment with status 'active' or 'completed'
contacts.py line 152-174: After creating step 1 task, enrollment advances to current_step=2 to prevent scheduler double-fire
contacts.py line 153-159: next_send_at correctly calculated from step 2 delay values
campaigns.py line 625-650: duplicate_campaign still works correctly, creates copy with '(Copy)' suffix and active=false
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns and contacts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tag-triggered campaign enrollment is fully working. When a user applies a tag to a contact that matches an active campaign's trigger_tag: (1) enrollment is created, (2) if step 1 has delay=0, a task+pending_send+notification is created immediately, (3) enrollment advances to step 2 with correct next_send_at. Duplicate enrollments are prevented. Test file: test_tag_campaign_enrollment_immediate.py with comprehensive test cases.

backend_api.POST /api/campaigns/{user_id}: PASS - Creates campaign with 3 sequences and trigger_tag
backend_api.PATCH /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_i: PASS - Applies tag and triggers enrollment
backend_api.GET /api/tasks/{user_id}?filter=today: PASS - Returns task with type=campaign_send, source=campaign
backend_api.GET /api/campaigns/{user_id}/pending-sen: PASS - Returns pending send for step 1

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sending is mocked, only task/pending_send creation verified
